title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (19) لسنة 1980 بالموافقة على اتفاقية إنشاء جامعة الخليج العربي
title_en: Decree No. (20) of 1980 approving the Loan Convention entered into between the Government of the State of Bahrain, a Group of Banks, and the Gulf International Bank to Finance the Purchase by the State of Bahrain of 60% of the Capital of the Bahrain Petroleum Company and Related Operations
